scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @pagemint/core --filter @pagemint/hono --filter @pagemint/cache-memory --filter @pagemint/actions build && pnpm run assets:build:raw && tsx watch src/server.tsx
scripts.dev:bun: pnpm --filter @pagemint/core --filter @pagemint/hono --filter @pagemint/cache-memory --filter @pagemint/actions build && pnpm run assets:build:raw && bun run src/server.bun.ts
scripts.assets:build: pnpm run sdk:build && pnpm run assets:build:raw
scripts.assets:watch: pnpm run sdk:build && pnpm run assets:watch:raw
